title: sempervivum tectorum var. lesurinum
intro: Sempervivum tectorum var. lesurinum, also known as Hens and Chicks, is a succulent plant species that belongs to the Crassulaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sempervivum tectorum var. lesurinum include wound healing, reducing inflammation, and fighting off infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, and is also used externally to treat skin conditions and promote wound healing.
